name: sonata-studio
description: Federated multi-Sonata workspace — Studio rooms over 4A v0.5 audiences
author: evan108108

actions.name: studio_room_create
actions.description: Create a new Studio room (audience). Generates aud_id + epoch_1 keypairs locally and publishes the founding declaration + grant via the 4A gateway.

params.name: slug
params.description: Room slug, [A-Za-z0-9-]+.

params.name: title
params.description: Human-readable room title (≤200 chars).

params.name: description
params.description: Optional long description (≤2000 chars).

params.name: project
params.description: Optional project slug for grouping.

params.name: default_tracks
params.description: Optional array of track slugs to create alongside the room.

actions.name: studio_room_join
actions.description: Join a Studio room from a 4a:// or https:// invite URL.

params.name: invite_url
params.description: 4a:// or https://… invite URL containing slug, epoch, invite_pub, and ?priv= bech32 token.

params.name: profile
params.description: Optional volunteered profile preview {nickname?: string, bio?: string} embedded in the claim event content so the founder can identify the joiner before admitting. PRIVACY: anyone holding the invite URL can read claim content — joiner is opting into exposing these strings to invite holders. Avatar is deliberately excluded (no room epoch key yet to encrypt against).

actions.name: studio_room_invite
actions.description: Mint a one-time invite for a room. Founder-only.

params.name: room_slug
params.description: Slug of the room to invite to (founder-only).

params.name: ttl_seconds
params.description: Invite TTL in seconds (default 604800 = 7 days, min 60).

actions.name: studio_room_admit
actions.description: Founder-only. Scan pending claims for a room; rotate epoch + grant new keys to admitted members.

params.name: room_slug
params.description: Slug of the room to admit pending claims for (founder-only).

params.name: max_admit
params.description: Cap admissions per call (default unlimited).

actions.name: studio_room_pending
actions.description: Founder-only. List pending kind:30522 claims for a room without rotating, with each claim's volunteered profile preview (nickname + bio) parsed from the claim's content. Used by the admit dialog to render per-row identity previews.

params.name: room_slug
params.description: Slug of the room to list pending claims for (founder-only).

actions.name: studio_room_list
actions.description: List all Studio rooms this Sonata is a member of.

actions.name: studio_room_delete
actions.description: Local-only delete: removes the room entity + keys from this Sonata. Does NOT publish a revocation event — other members keep their copies (federated revoke is v0.x+ work).

params.name: slug
params.description: Slug of the room to delete locally.

actions.name: studio_card_post
actions.description: Post a card (kind 30530) to a room/track.

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: track
params.description: Track slug within the room.

params.name: kind
params.description: Card kind (lead | review | finding | observation | task | note | other).

params.name: title
params.description: Title (≤200 chars).

params.name: body
params.description: Long-form markdown body (≤10000 chars).

params.name: summary
params.description: DEPRECATED alias for `body`. Accepted for one cutover release past 2026-05-12; new clients should send `body`.

params.name: blocks
params.description: Optional array of structured content blocks, each {type: <string>, ...}.

params.name: related_to
params.description: Optional array of related event ids or 4A addresses.

params.name: tags
params.description: Optional array of free-form tag strings.

params.name: d_tag
params.description: Override d-tag for replaceable-event addressing (default: sluggified title + 8-hex).

actions.name: studio_card_list
actions.description: List cards in a room, optionally filtered by track or recency.

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: track
params.description: Optional track slug filter.

params.name: since
params.description: Optional Unix-ms cutoff; cards older than this are excluded.

params.name: limit
params.description: Page size, default 50, max 200.

actions.name: studio_card_delete
actions.description: Author-only soft-delete: republishes the card (kind 30530) with status='deleted'. The replaceable d_tag overwrites the original; renderers filter status=deleted out.

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: d_tag
params.description: d_tag of the card to soft-delete (from CardPostResult).

actions.name: studio_card_update
actions.description: Author-only edit: republishes the card (kind 30530) with merged fields. Omitted fields preserve the existing value from the local entity; present fields overwrite. Replaceable d_tag overwrites the prior rumor at every member.

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: d_tag
params.description: d_tag of the card to update.

params.name: track
params.description: Override track slug. Omit to preserve.

params.name: kind
params.description: Override card kind. Omit to preserve.

params.name: title
params.description: Override title (≤200 chars). Omit to preserve.

params.name: body
params.description: Override long-form markdown body (≤10000 chars). Omit to preserve.

params.name: summary
params.description: DEPRECATED alias for `body`. Accepted for one cutover release past 2026-05-12; new clients should send `body`.

params.name: blocks
params.description: Override blocks array. Omit to preserve.

params.name: related_to
params.description: Override related_to list. Omit to preserve.

params.name: tags
params.description: Override tags list. Omit to preserve.

actions.name: studio_track_create
actions.description: Create a track within a room (kind 30531).

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: name
params.description: Track slug, [A-Za-z0-9-]+.

params.name: title
params.description: Display title (≤200 chars).

params.name: layout
params.description: One of: column | timeline | grouped (default column).

params.name: description
params.description: Optional long description (≤2000 chars).

actions.name: studio_comment_post
actions.description: Post a comment on a card or other target (kind 30533).

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: target
params.description: 64-hex event id, nostr: URI, or 4A address of the comment target.

params.name: body
params.description: Comment body (≤4000 chars).

params.name: intent
params.description: Optional intent tag: agree | disagree | question | verify | dispatch | note | other.

actions.name: studio_question_post
actions.description: Post a question to a room (kind 30534).

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: body
params.description: Question body (≤4000 chars).

params.name: track
params.description: Optional track slug.

params.name: tags
params.description: Optional array of free-form tag strings.

actions.name: studio_answer_post
actions.description: Post an answer to a question (kind 30535).

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: question_id
params.description: 64-hex event id of the question being answered.

params.name: body
params.description: Answer body (≤4000 chars).

actions.name: studio_dispatch_intent_post
actions.description: Publish a dispatch-intent record for a bus event (kind 30532).

params.name: room
params.description: Room slug.

params.name: event_id
params.description: Bus event id this intent decides.

params.name: candidates
params.description: Non-empty array of candidate identifier strings.

params.name: chosen
params.description: Selected candidate (must appear in candidates).

params.name: reason
params.description: Reason for the choice (≤2000 chars).

params.name: signals
params.description: Optional flat map of string|number|boolean signals (≤32 keys).

params.name: track
params.description: Optional track slug.

actions.name: studio_member_set_nickname
actions.description: Locally set a nickname for a peer pubkey/npub. Does not publish.

params.name: pubkey_or_npub
params.description: Member 32-byte hex pubkey (npub bech32 deferred).

params.name: nickname
params.description: Display name to remember locally.

actions.name: studio_image_attach
actions.description: Encrypt + upload an image to Blossom under the room's current audience epoch key. Returns an image-block payload for embedding in a card's blocks[].

params.name: file_path
params.description: Absolute path under ~/Library/Caches/com.sonata/ or ~/Downloads/.

params.name: room_slug
params.description: Room slug — used to look up the current epoch.

params.name: mime_type
params.description: Optional MIME override; inferred from extension if absent.

actions.name: studio_identity
actions.description: Return the plugin's signing pubkey (lowercase hex). Renderer uses this to gate author-only UI without waiting on optimistic-reconcile heuristics.
